forbidden_scope: WebEnvoy/Core, Harbor, or App repository changes
executable validate-only, draft, preview, or write packages
runtime execution, browser automation, live source/evidence lookup, or provider/profile/session fields
cookies, tokens, raw evidence bodies, production payloads, or user business data
hosted registry, marketplace, sync service, crawler queue, benchmark contract, package publishing, or true write capability

integration_evidence.summary: Declares validate-only, draft, preview, and write modes deferred; keeps current sample allowed modes to read; blocks write execution claims.
Validator loads the guardrail and checks identity, package/capability alignment, deferred coverage, read-only allowed mode, and blocked write execution.
Manifest exposes the GH-103 guardrail as a present package asset.
Package lock pins the guardrail id/version/path with the rest of the local package assets.
Repo-local package index exposes the guardrail path without introducing hosted registry, runtime, or write behavior.

commands.summary: Validator returned status `passed` with no errors or warnings and checked `write_deferred_guardrail` as present.
Explicit registry-index validation returned status `passed` with no errors or warnings and checked `write_deferred_guardrail` as present.
Confirmed guardrail schema version, deferred status, read-only current allowed mode, write mode coverage, deferred true write boundary, and blocked admission write execution.
Installed Loom surface diagnostics passed; CLI freshness advisory was non-blocking.
Fact chain read from GH-103 current entry with no key gaps after correcting checkpoint to `build`.
Minimal suite path found core required artifacts present.
Carrier locators, normalized status, relationships, and Work Item backlinks passed.

Build flow reported suite CLI JSON unavailable and ownership_constraints missing despite direct suite/carrier pass and readable build evidence. No code or carrier gap remained after checkpoint correction.
PR #132 metadata machine block parsed successfully and matched GitHub body readback for head f38eadf8f3255f24b83f51e6400fde2ebb59e0c0.

demo-bootstrap, loom-check, py-compile, and repo-local-cli passed. loom-pr-merge-gate failed because merge checkpoint fell back to build with missing_inputs=[], while metadata, fact-chain, semantic review, and carrier-only head binding were accepted.
